description: Seventh cycle of autonomous improvements. Focus on completing i18n coverage for remaining pages and key components, accessibility audit and fixes, and performance optimization for analytics pages.

userStories.title: Add i18n translations for FeedPage, GapAnalysisPage, and LibraryPage
acceptanceCriteria: All hardcoded English strings in FeedPage.tsx replaced with t() calls
All hardcoded English strings in GapAnalysisPage.tsx replaced with t() calls
All hardcoded English strings in LibraryPage.tsx replaced with t() calls
English and Chinese translations added to locale files
Action button labels (Health Check, Repair Metadata, Auto-Tag, Cluster Papers) translated
userStories.notes: FeedPage has 'Research Feed', 'No recommendations yet...', 'Refresh' strings. GapAnalysisPage has 'Metadata Health', 'Total Papers', 'Healthy' stat labels, action buttons. LibraryPage has page title and filter labels. Use existing patterns: dynamic keys with fallback for status labels, i18next interpolation for counts.

userStories.title: Add i18n translations for key shared components
acceptanceCriteria: AudioPlayer component strings translated (play, pause, speed controls)
CollectionSidebar component strings translated
EvidenceConsensus component strings translated
PDF reader CitationCardPanel and HighlightOverlay strings translated
ExportDialog component strings translated
playground MessageBubble and CompletionSuggestion strings translated
userStories.notes: These components are reused across multiple pages, so i18n here has high leverage. Check each component for hardcoded user-facing strings. Follow the existing naming convention: namespace matches component area (e.g., 'audio', 'collections', 'evidence').

userStories.title: Accessibility audit and fixes for critical user flows
acceptanceCriteria: All interactive elements have keyboard navigation (Tab order, Enter/Space activation)
Images and icons have meaningful alt/aria-label text
Color contrast meets WCAG AA standards (4.5:1 for normal text)
Form inputs have associated labels
ARIA live regions for dynamic content updates (toast notifications, loading states)
Screen reader can navigate main pages (PapersPage, PlaygroundPage, AnalyticsPage)
userStories.notes: Focus on the most-used pages first: Playground (chat), Papers (list view), Analytics (charts). Use Playwright or manual audit to identify gaps. Fix critical issues: missing labels, keyboard traps, insufficient contrast on badges/links.

userStories.title: Performance optimization for analytics and trends pages
acceptanceCriteria: AnalyticsPage charts use useMemo for expensive data transformations
Reading streak heatmap (from AUTO-025) renders efficiently with 365+ data points
TrendsPage with multiple recharts graphs does not re-render on unrelated state changes
Large paper lists use virtualization or pagination (500+ papers)
No unnecessary re-renders detected by React DevTools profiler on typical interactions
userStories.notes: AnalyticsPage and TrendsPage use recharts which can be heavy with many data points. The reading streak heatmap from AUTO-025 renders a calendar grid. Check for missing React.memo on pure display components, useMemo for data transformations, and React Query staleTime configuration for caching.

userStories.title: Add keyboard shortcuts to remaining pages
acceptanceCriteria: PapersPage: Ctrl+K for search focus, Delete for selected papers
AnalyticsPage: 1/2/3 number keys to switch between chart views
DiscoveryPage: Ctrl+R to refresh recommendations
WritingPage: Ctrl+S to save draft (if not already present)
SettingsPage: Escape to close any open section
userStories.notes: AUTO-028 added keyboard shortcuts to PlaygroundPage and WritingPage. Extend to other frequently-used pages. Use the existing useKeyboardShortcuts hook from frontend/src/hooks/. Add visual hints in the UI (e.g., ^K next to search icon) so users can discover shortcuts.
